name: Golden Puff Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients: all-purpose flour, granulated white sugar, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg.
2. Stir all wet ingredients into the dry mixture with a fork until thoroughly mixed. Wet ingredients include vegetable oil, milk, and egg.
3. Drop spoonfuls (small size) of the batter into deep hot oil or fat fryer preheated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Fry each puff until golden brown, approximately 3 minutes.
5. Remove from oil using a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels and cooling rack.
6. Roll warm puffs in cinnamon-sugar or glaze by dipping into a thin confectioner's sugar icing.
7. Do not cook too many at one time, as the fat will cool down and the puffs will absorb grease and remain doughy.
